name: Yang Lü (Weifang)
page_title: Yang Lü (Weifang) 楊慮 (威方) – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	(1): According to Chu Guo Xian Xian Zhuan: Yang Yi’s elder brother was named [Yang] Lu styled Wei Fang. When he was young he was virtuous and was Jiang Nan guang mian (?). 州郡禮召, 諸公辟請, 皆不能屈. He died at a young age of seventeen. His fellow villages gave him a name as A Gentleman who Walks the Virtuous Path (de xing yang jun).
	From Yang Yi’s SGZ

full_text:
Yang Lü (Weifang) 楊慮 (威方)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Lü (楊慮), styledWeifang (威方). A promising man with a lot of virtue and talent who died at the age of 16.
